message:
fix: missions back-button trap on filter + auth cache staleness test (#6146)

- #6145: MissionSidebar back-to-missions button was gated on
  listTotalMissions > 1, which trapped users who filtered via
  missionSearchQuery down to a single result (no way to clear
  activeMission). Now always visible when activeMission != null.

- #6144: auth.test.ts 'drops session to login when /api/me fails
  and cache is stale' was waiting on isLoading===false, but
  AuthProvider initializes isLoading=false when both token and
  cached user exist (stale-while-revalidate). That meant the
  waitFor resolved before refreshUser's async catch block cleared
  the token. Fix: wait directly on token becoming null.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
